```python
expected = "1101"
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"
assert expected in counts, f"Expected dominant bitstring {expected} not found in counts"

expected_count = counts[expected]
other_counts = [v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected]

assert expected_count == max(counts.values()), f"{expected} is not the most frequent outcome"
assert expected_count > 0.7 * shots, f"{expected} should strongly dominate the distribution"
if other_counts:
    assert expected_count >= 5 * max(other_counts), f"{expected} is not clearly higher frequency than the others"
```

```python
target = "1101"
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

target_count = counts.get(target, 0)
max_other = max((v for k, v in counts.items() if k != target), default=0)

assert target_count == max(counts.values()), f"Expected {target} to be the dominant result, got counts={counts}"
assert target_count > max_other, f"Expected {target} to occur more often than any other bitstring, got counts={counts}"
assert target_count >= 0.7 * shots, f"Expected strong dominance for {target}, got {target_count}/{shots}"
```

```python
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0

target = "1101"
target_count = counts.get(target, 0)

assert target_count > 0, f"Expected dominant bitstring {target} to appear, got counts={counts}"

other_counts = [v for k, v in counts.items() if k != target]
max_other = max(other_counts) if other_counts else 0

assert target_count == max(counts.values()), f"Expected {target} to be the most frequent outcome, got counts={counts}"
assert target_count > max_other * 5, f"Expected {target} to dominate strongly over others, got counts={counts}"

if shots:
    assert target_count / shots > 0.7, f"Expected {target} frequency > 70%, got {target_count}/{shots}"
```

```python
expected = "1101"
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and counts, "counts must be a non-empty dict"

top_bitstring = max(counts, key=counts.get)
top_count = counts[top_bitstring]
expected_count = counts.get(expected, 0)

assert top_bitstring == expected, f"Expected dominant bitstring {expected}, got {top_bitstring}"
assert expected_count == top_count, f"{expected} is not the most frequent outcome"

other_counts = [v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected]
assert other_counts, "Expected at least one alternative measurement outcome"
assert expected_count > max(other_counts), f"{expected} does not clearly exceed all other outcomes"

if shots:
    assert expected_count / shots > 0.85, f"{expected} should dominate strongly, got frequency {expected_count / shots:.3f}"
```

```python
dominant_bitstring = "1101"
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0

dominant_count = counts.get(dominant_bitstring, 0)
assert dominant_count > 0, f"Expected dominant bitstring {dominant_bitstring} to appear in counts: {counts}"

max_other = max((v for k, v in counts.items() if k != dominant_bitstring), default=0)
assert dominant_count == max(counts.values()), f"{dominant_bitstring} is not the most frequent outcome: {counts}"
assert dominant_count > max_other * 2, f"{dominant_bitstring} should dominate clearly over others: {counts}"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Counts should sum to shots ({shots}), got {total}"
assert dominant_count > 0.65 * shots, f"{dominant_bitstring} should occur in a strong majority of shots: {counts}"
```

```python
expected = "1101"
```

```python
other_counts = [v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected]
```

```python
target = "1101"
assert isinstance(counts, dict) and len(counts) > 0
assert target in counts, f"Expected dominant bitstring {target} to appear in counts: {counts}"

target_count = counts[target]
other_counts = [v for k, v in counts.items() if k != target]
max_other = max(other_counts) if other_counts else 0

assert target_count > max_other, f"{target} is not the most frequent outcome: {counts}"
assert target_count >= 3 * max_other if max_other > 0 else target_count > 0, (
    f"{target} should dominate clearly over other outcomes: {counts}"
)

total = sum(counts.values())
assert target_count > total / 2, f"{target} should account for a majority of shots: {counts}"
```

```python
expected = "1101"
```

```python
dominant = max(counts, key=counts.get)
dominant_count = counts[dominant]

assert dominant == expected, f"Expected dominant bitstring {expected}, got {dominant}"

other_counts = [v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected]
second_best = max(other_counts) if other_counts else 0

assert dominant_count > second_best, (
    f"{expected} is not more frequent than all others: {dominant_count} vs {second_best}"
)
assert dominant_count >= 0.6 * shots, (
    f"{expected} should strongly dominate, but only appeared {dominant_count}/{shots} times"
)
```

```python
expected = "1101"
assert expected in counts, f"Expected dominant bitstring {expected} not found in counts: {counts}"

dominant = counts[expected]
others = [v for k, v in counts.items() if k != expected]
max_other = max(others) if others else 0

assert dominant > max_other, f"{expected} is not the most frequent outcome: {counts}"
assert dominant >= 0.6 * shots, f"{expected} should strongly dominate, but only got {dominant}/{shots} shots"
assert max_other <= 0.3 * shots, f"Non-target outcomes are too frequent: max other = {max_other}/{shots}"
```
